use_cases: Creating engaging landing page hero sections with scroll-triggered animations
Building interactive product showcase or demo pages
Designing scroll-based storytelling experiences for product launches
Adding visual interest to marketing or portfolio pages
Creating memorable first impressions on SaaS landing pages
ai_summary: A scroll-animated hero component featuring an SVG path that progressively draws as users scroll. The component includes gradient-styled typography, a floating call-to-action button, and a dark minimalist aesthetic. Designed for creating engaging, interactive landing page experiences that capture attention through motion and visual effects.
